summary: Refreshed current dependency and tool pins by updating nixpkgs in flake.lock from b5aa0fbd538984f6e3d201be0005b4463d8b09f8 dated 2026-06-29 to 65179426c83bb3f6bc14898b42ea1c6f01d374b0 dated 2026-07-02, and updating the Tuist mise pin from 4.200.5 to 4.201.0 after confirming the current latest value.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Run nix flake update and refresh nixpkgs without changing flake input policy.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: nix flake update updated only the locked nixpkgs metadata in flake.lock; flake.nix was not changed.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Run nix develop -c mise latest tuist and update .mise.toml if latest is still 4.201.0.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: nix develop -c mise latest tuist reported 4.201.0, and .mise.toml now pins tuist = "4.201.0".
Changed files are limited to flake.lock, .mise.toml, and evidence/report files for this node.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Record before/after pins and no-product-runtime-claim notes.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-dependency-pin-refresh/commands.log records before/after nixpkgs and Tuist pins; evidence/m4-dependency-pin-refresh/notes.md documents the scoped validation claim.
nix flake check and nix develop -c just check passed; git diff --check and jq validation are recorded in evidence/m4-dependency-pin-refresh/commands.log.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node only refreshes dependency/tool pins. Repository checks validated the refreshed pins; product runtime validation is not required and no product runtime behavior is claimed.
